properties.name: turboquant.backend
properties.description: Backend to use.  {@code "auto"} (default) picks the highest-priority available backend.  Other values: {@code "cpu-stub"}, {@code "cuda"}, {@code "hip"}.

properties.name: turboquant.device-index
properties.description: Zero-based GPU device index passed to {@link com.turboquant.runtime.api.BackendConfig}.
